title: stachys subcrenata subsp. fragilis
intro: Stachys subcrenata subsp. fragilis, also known as the Chinese woundwort, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and fighting infections due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys subcrenata subsp. fragilis include promoting wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
